name: Lendmark Financial Services LLC
description_short: Lendmark Financial Services is a consumer finance company offering personal loans, auto loans, and debt consolidation with fixed rates and same-day funding at their Charlotte NC branch.
description_long:
Lendmark Financial Services LLC is an established consumer finance company that operates multiple branch locations, including their Charlotte, NC office at 3220 Wilkinson Blvd. The company provides a range of lending products designed for consumers seeking alternative financing solutions outside traditional banking channels. They position themselves as a personalized, relationship-focused lender that emphasizes understanding individual borrower needs.

The company's primary offerings include personal loans for various purposes (vacations, weddings, general expenses), auto loans for new or used vehicle purchases and refinancing, debt consolidation loans designed to simplify multiple monthly payments into a single loan, and retail merchant finance services. They advertise fixed interest rates, scheduled/predictable payments, flexible payment options, and same-day funding as core features. Their application process can be completed in-branch or online, with approval decisions provided after document verification, followed by branch finalization and fund disbursement.

Lendmark distinguishes itself through claims of personalized service, quick approval timelines, local branch availability with friendly service, and same-day funding capability. The company appears to target consumers who may not qualify for traditional bank loans or prefer in-person relationship banking. They have integrated online payment processing through third-party provider ACI Payments and offer a pre-qualification tool on their website. The company previously operated Century Finance locations, which they have integrated into their Lendmark brand.

A honest assessment reveals that Lendmark is a legitimate consumer finance lender operating within the subprime/non-prime lending space, but specific APR rates, credit score requirements, loan terms, and fee structures are not disclosed on the website. Consumers should expect interest rates higher than traditional banks, as is standard in this lending category. The lack of transparent rate information upfront and reliance on in-branch visits for final approval details are typical characteristics of this lending model.
address: 3140 W Shaw Ave Suite 109 Suite 109, Fresno, CA 93711

company_info.headquarters: 3140 W Shaw Ave Suite 109 Suite 109, Fresno, CA 93711

pros: Same-day funding available for approved loans
Fixed interest rates with predictable, scheduled payments
Multiple loan products including personal loans, auto loans, and debt consolidation
Local branch availability in Charlotte with in-person relationship banking
Online and in-branch application options for convenience
Debt consolidation specifically designed to combine multiple bills into one payment
Flexible payment options mentioned to fit individual budgets
cons: No APR rates, interest rates, or fee structure disclosed on the website
Credit score requirements and approval criteria not transparent
Loan amounts and terms not specified online—requires in-branch consultation
Limited branch locations visible; appears to be regional rather than national
No information provided about what credit profiles qualify or typical approval timelines
best_for: Consumers seeking quick personal loans for specific expenses (weddings, vacations, home improvements)
Borrowers with fair or subprime credit looking to consolidate high-rate debts into one payment
Auto buyers wanting fixed-rate financing without negotiating with dealerships
Consumers who prefer in-person banking relationships over purely online lenders
diagnosis: Lendmark Financial Services is best for consumers with fair or subprime credit who need personal or auto loans quickly and prefer relationship-based, in-person banking. The primary caveat is that all rates, terms, and fees are non-transparent on their website—borrowers must visit a branch or apply online to receive specific pricing, making cost comparison difficult before commitment.
services: Personal loans with fixed interest rates
Auto loans for new or used vehicles
Online payment processing via ACI Payments
